market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Liverpool City Home Close to Anfield Stadium
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Experience the vibrant city of Liverpool in this comfortable and stylish 2-bedroom apartment. Located in the Anfield area, just a short walk from Anfield Stadium, this home offers the perfect combination of local culture and easy access to the city. Sleep up to 4 guests in the spacious bedrooms, each with ample storage space and a relaxing atmosphere. Enjoy the fully-equipped kitchen, perfect for cooking up a storm, and the modern bathrooms, complete with all the essentials. With a 4.65-star rating from 133 reviews, this home is a trusted choice for visitors to Liverpool.

Additional features of this apartment include:

* 2 spacious bedrooms for up to 4 guests
* 1 fully-equipped kitchen
* 1 modern bathroom
* Fast Wi-Fi for staying connected

This apartment is available for £116 per night. Guests can look forward to a comfortable and enjoyable stay in this beautifully-presented Liverpool home.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space for guests to unwind and enjoy the city views
Parking facilities for easy access to the apartment
Entertainment options such as a TV or games console for relaxation
analysis.photo_order_rec: Feature a beautiful photo of the living room as the cover photo, leading in with the stylish decor and modern furniture.
key_diagnosis: Listings in the same market as Ayo's property have a 28.3% median occupancy rate over the next 90 days, while Ayo's property is at 19.6%, leaving significant room for improvement
Ayo's property is priced £59 less than the median nightly rate in the same market (£175.00), which may be deterring bookings and impacting occupancy
The property has no listed images, which can have a direct impact on booking conversion rates, with a typical property having 5-7 labelled images
analysis.outreach_hook: With a significant price gap of £59 vs the cohort median and an occupancy rate of only 19.6% over the next 90 days, there's a clear opportunity to enhance your property's appeal and boost bookings.
